name: player_keeptradecut_value range year_offset averages the offset-window snapshots (executed-result parity)
description: keeptradecut_rankings is date-grained (no year column), so a range year_offset resolves the snapshot epochs from opening_day(base_year) + k years. Seed a 2023 REG game (so opening_days has a 2023 row), REFRESH the opening_days matview inside the rolled-back transaction, then seed three ktc snapshots for the player: at opening_day+1yr (v=4000), opening_day+2yr (v=4160), and an out-of-window distractor at opening_day+0 (v=9999). Run player_keeptradecut_value with year=[2023] + year_offset=[1,2]. The bespoke main_select_string_year_offset_range must AVG only the two in-window snapshots (4080) and exclude the base-year distractor -- proving it neither collapses to year_offset[0] nor widens the window. The oracle re-derives the AVG via an independent value threshold (v < 9000) rather than the date-window logic.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, (SELECT AVG(ktc_o.v) FROM keeptradecut_rankings ktc_o JOIN opening_days od_o ON od_o.year = 2023 WHERE ktc_o.pid = player.pid AND ktc_o.qb = 2 AND ktc_o.type = 1 AND ktc_o.d IN (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (date_trunc('day', od_o.opening_day) + interval '1 year'))::integer, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (date_trunc('day', od_o.opening_day) + interval '2 year'))::integer)) AS "player_keeptradecut_value_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" where player.primary_position IN ('ZZ') group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500

seed: INSERT INTO player (pid, first_name, last_name, short_name, formatted_name, primary_position, secondary_position, date_of_birth, nfl_draft_year, current_nfl_team) VALUES ('TEST-KTC-000907', 'Test', 'Ktc', 'T.Ktc', 'Test Ktc', 'ZZ', 'ZZ', '2000-01-01', 2020, 'ZZA')
INSERT INTO nfl_games (esbid, year, week, seas_type, v, h, date) VALUES (970301, 2023, 1, 'REG', 'ZZA', 'ZZX', '2023-09-07')

INSERT INTO keeptradecut_rankings (pid, qb, type, d, v) SELECT 'TEST-KTC-000907', 2, 1, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (date_trunc('day', opening_day) + interval '1 year'))::integer, 4000 FROM opening_days WHERE year = 2023

INSERT INTO keeptradecut_rankings (pid, qb, type, d, v) SELECT 'TEST-KTC-000907', 2, 1, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (date_trunc('day', opening_day) + interval '2 year'))::integer, 4160 FROM opening_days WHERE year = 2023
INSERT INTO keeptradecut_rankings (pid, qb, type, d, v) SELECT 'TEST-KTC-000907', 2, 1, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM date_trunc('day', opening_day))::integer, 9999 FROM opening_days WHERE year = 2023
result_equivalence.reference_sql: SELECT AVG(v) AS player_keeptradecut_value_0 FROM keeptradecut_rankings WHERE pid = 'TEST-KTC-000907' AND qb = 2 AND type = 1 AND v < 9000
